title: dortmanna purpurascens
intro: Dortmanna purpurascens, also known as Purple-flowered Dortmannia, is a flowering plant species in the family Gentianaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dortmanna purpurascens include alleviating symptoms of coughs, colds, and flu, as well as its potential to reduce fever and relieve congestion. The plant can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including infusions, teas, and tinctures, although its preparation and usage should be done under the guidance of a medical professional.
